original_issue.thesis: The corded landline revival is culturally visible but supply-side hollow — quality new corded phones are nearly impossible to source at retail, telecom infrastructure is being actively decommissioned, and the business opportunity sits with whoever rebuilds the supply chain before the aesthetic locks in.
